_publications._publicationTitle: Development of the PROMIS pediatric stigma and extension to the PROMIS pediatric stigma: skin item banks.

_contextSnippet: No items showed DIF between sample groups, indicating that the modified version, the PPS Measure...exhibited comparable measurement properties with the original version, the Neuro-QoL Pediatric Stigma Item bank
details: Exhibited comparable measurement properties with modified PPS version, showing no differential item functioning between sample groups
